description: Scientific pre-registration v5 (P1.2-C). Closes provenance, custody, failure-handling and G0A defects found by the independent audit of v4 (docs/audits/p1_2b_independent_audit.md). NO real data. NOT EXECUTED.

lineage.reason_for_v5: execution freeze v4 (tag switchsync-synthetic-execution-v4-freeze, 04c33309) is SUPERSEDED / NONEXECUTABLE / NEVER RUN: orchestrator SHA recorded as runner SHA, forgeable --orchestrator-sha, colliding run_id across scopes, mutable published bundles, contradictory crash policy, unchained checkpoint ledger, deadline not covering the chaos prerequisite, and no global failed-seed policy.

inference_contract.single_shared_function: src/metrics/inference.py:paired_decision (used identically by G1_weak, G1_strict, G2, G3, G4-baseline)
inference_contract.std_definition: sample standard deviation of the paired differences, ddof=1
inference_contract.zero_handling: |d|<=1e-12 dropped from the sign test and reported (n_zero)
inference_contract.decision: p>=alpha -> INCONCLUSIVE(NOT_SIGNIFICANT); elif mean>band -> PASS; elif mean<-band -> FAIL; else INCONCLUSIVE(TIE)
inference_contract.corrected_fact: an exact two-sided sign test with 8/8 equal signs gives p = 2*C(8,0)/2^8 = 0.0078125 (< 0.05). 8 evaluation seeds CAN reach significance.
inference_contract.bootstrap_role: DESCRIPTOR ONLY (n_boot=2000, boot_seed=20260713), not part of the decision; small-n caveat recorded. The rule is the exact sign test + band, NOT a bootstrap CI.

G0A_exact_reproduction.goal: Reproduce the paper regime (sigma_12=0.1) at paper scale.

cost_rule.isolated_layer_chaos_prerequisite: lambda_max>0 at the same (size, seed) before the switching cells of that size may count
cost_rule.pass_quantifier: PASS iff, for EVERY deciding size, ALL fast cells (T_swt<=25) have frac_synced>=0.5 AND ALL slow cells (T_swt>=120) have frac_synced<0.5, with the chaos prerequisite met; a single favorable N=100 (non-deciding) cell can NEVER decide the gate
cost_rule.partial_rule: any incomplete deciding cell -> verdict=INCONCLUSIVE, reason_code=INCONCLUSIVE_BY_COST
cost_rule.checkpoint: durable, append-only, OUTSIDE the repo: one atomic entry per cell (flush+fsync), keyed by freeze/prereg/contract/runner SHAs and params; duplicates rejected; crash-recoverable; no cell may be deleted to obtain a favorable verdict
cost_rule.deadline_scope: the wall-time budget covers the chaos prerequisite, the switching simulations AND checkpoint serialization; the deadline is checked before each size, before each seed/cell, and DURING chaos (chunked Benettin) and switching (chunked RK4)
cost_rule.size_order: deciding sizes {200,400} run FIRST; N=100 may not consume budget before them
cost_rule.clean_deadline_conversion: ONLY a clean frozen-deadline expiry (DeadlineExceeded raised by the budget check) converts to INCONCLUSIVE_BY_COST, after checkpointing completed cells and recording INTERRUPTED_BY_COST; an external signal/crash is NOT cost exhaustion and produces no verdict
cost_rule.checkpoint_ledger: hash-chained append-only JSONL outside the repo: per-record sequence number, prev_record_hash, record_hash; load verifies the full chain; duplicate cell UIDs, sequence gaps, reordering, changed results and foreign provenance are rejected; a truncated final line is detected, the valid prefix preserved, and continuation requires explicit authorization; evidence is never silently deleted

G0B_calibrated_demonstration.label: CALIBRATED_QUALITATIVE_DEMONSTRATION (NOT reproduction)
G0B_calibrated_demonstration.accept: DEMONSTRATED(=PASS) iff ALL fast cells (T_swt<=10) synchronize (frac_synced>=0.5) AND ALL slow cells (T_swt>=160) do NOT (frac_synced<0.5); >20% failed/nonfinite seeds in any cell -> EXECUTION_INVALID
G0B_calibrated_demonstration.forbidden_claim: no N-dependence of the switching threshold without a multi-N switching grid

G0C_msf_minimal.goal: Minimal transverse Lyapunov, anti-phase channels only.
G0C_msf_minimal.accept: channels not anti-phase -> EXECUTION_INVALID(PREREQ_FAIL); no Psi<0 at the fastest T_swt -> FAIL; Psi<0 but onset independent of T_swt -> INCONCLUSIVE(PARTIAL_NO_TSWT_DEPENDENCE); Psi<0 with T_swt-dependent onset -> PASS

G1_weak.goal: Switching beats static-sparse of equal instantaneous density.
G1_weak.estimand: gamma_selected_arm - gamma_static_sparse, paired over evaluation seeds
G1_weak.arm_selection: the switching RATE arm is chosen on the paired_selection seeds ONLY (max mean selection gamma; deterministic tie-break by canonical arm order fast<intermediate<slow) and FROZEN before any evaluation seed is opened

G1_strict.goal: Switching beats the average graph AND the best-of-frozen-candidate-set static.
G1_strict.comparator_note: the admissible universe is C(24,6)=134596 subsets; the frozen candidate set is the base snapshots UNION a frozen random search (best_static_search). No exhaustive/certified search is performed, so G1_strict MUST NOT claim to beat the best admissible static.
G1_strict.estimand: gamma_selected_arm - max(gamma_average, gamma_best_of_frozen_candidates), paired over evaluation seeds; candidate static SUBSET selected on selection seeds and FROZEN
G1_strict.candidate_ordering: candidates are canonical sorted tuples; ties in selection score broken lexicographically
G1_strict.interpretability: NOT_INTERPRETABLE unless G1_weak PASS (diagnostic value may be computed but not interpreted as a gate)

G2_order.goal: Temporal order changes contraction beyond the multiset/average.
G2_order.estimand: delta_s = gamma_ordered - median(gamma_permutations); aggregated by the shared paired_decision over evaluation seeds
G2_order.decision: PASS iff shared paired_decision(delta_s) is PASS or FAIL (a significant order effect in either direction beyond the band); else INCONCLUSIVE (evidence favors aggregate connectivity)
G2_order.not_abs_vs_zero: the statistic is the signed delta against the permutation MEDIAN, aggregated by a paired test; NOT abs(effect) compared to zero as a null mean
G2_order.method_definition: per evaluation seed: delta_s = gamma_ordered - median(gamma over g2_n_perm frozen order-permutations with independent per-seed RNG); the delta_s are aggregated across seeds by the shared exact sign test + effect band. This is NOT a per-seed permutation test: it detects a systematic displacement of the observed order relative to the permutation median, and order effects of varying sign across seeds can cancel. This limitation is frozen and disclosed.

G3_robustness.goal: Robustness of the G1_weak advantage to IMPLEMENTED stresses.
G3_robustness.per_stage: shared paired_decision on (gamma_fast - gamma_static) over the stage seed block
G3_robustness.gate_rule: PASS iff BOTH faithful and mild_heterogeneity stages are PASS; else INCONCLUSIVE(LIMITED). A signed stage where ANY seed lacks a strictly negative off-diagonal weight, OR whose off-diagonal Frobenius budget differs from its unsigned comparator by more than signed_budget_tolerance, -> EXECUTION_INVALID(STRESS_NOT_IMPLEMENTED)
G3_robustness.per_seed_metadata: operator metadata recorded for ALL seeds (not only the last)

G4_identifiability.goal: Recover switching from observations, past-only, same-realization ground truth.
G4_identifiability.horizon_assertion: for every seed, schedule.total_steps MUST equal horizon_steps (asserted at runtime before simulating)
conditions: basis estimator beats the factor-confounded baseline
G4_identifiability.beats_baseline: per-seed paired difference (basis_precision - levelcorr_precision) fed to the shared paired_decision with floor=identifiability_margin (0.05); PASS required (significant positive margin)
G4_identifiability.accept: PASS iff ALL FOUR conditions hold; else FAIL
G4_identifiability.async_language: asynchrony/LOCF (Epps-like) degradation, NOT a causal Epps demonstration

custody.run_dir: EXTERNAL to the repo, required for a full run; results NEVER inside the frozen repo
custody.no_overwrite_resume_retry: a target report that already exists is refused; there is no resume/retry policy without an explicit frozen one
custody.suite_transaction: the suite writes to a staging dir and publishes to <run-dir>/<run_id>/ by atomic rename ONLY on full success; on any gate failure it writes a failure ledger and publishes NO success bundle
custody.sequential_individual_runs: individual runners may write distinct reports into the same <run-dir>/<run_id>/ sequentially; the first output never invalidates the freeze identity (outputs are external)
custody.flag_semantics: --cheap-only runs G0B/G0C/G1G2/G3/G4 and leaves G0A NOT_RUN; --include-g0a-expensive adds G0A; supplying BOTH is a contradiction and is rejected

removed_gates.H3: coverage-vs-reachability isolation removed; temporal_reachability_ratio is a descriptor only

identity_and_custody.campaign_id: sha256(prereg_canonical | execution_contract_canonical | freeze_content_hash | freeze_commit)[:16] — identifies the scientific contract
identity_and_custody.attempt_id: sha256(campaign_id | execution_scope | authorization_token)[:16] — identifies ONE authorized execution
identity_and_custody.scope_is_code_determined: the scope is derived from the invocation (runner module or suite flags), never operator-supplied text
identity_and_custody.authorization_token: supplied explicitly with --authorization-token; recorded ONLY as its SHA-256, never in clear
identity_and_custody.provenance_rule: each report records the SHA-256 of the scientific runner file that computed it; the orchestrator SHA is set exclusively by run_suite_v2 via child_context() (immutable per-gate contexts); there is NO CLI argument to inject an orchestrator SHA; individual runners record orchestrator_sha256=null and execution_mode='individual:<gate>'
identity_and_custody.attempt_manifest: before publication: campaign/attempt ids, scope, document hashes, HEAD/tag, normalized command, runner+orchestrator SHAs, start/end UTC, exit status, every report with its SHA-256, checkpoint SHA, gate verdicts, environment, state=COMPLETED, and the manifest's own content hash
identity_and_custody.sealing: publication = atomic rename staging->final, SEALED marker with the manifest content hash, fsync of files and directories, post-seal re-verification of every report SHA; a SEALED directory refuses ANY further write
identity_and_custody.concurrency: an exclusive flock on <run-dir>/<attempt_id>.lock prevents concurrent executions of the same attempt_id
identity_and_custody.coexistence: cheap-suite and g0a-only attempts coexist under the same campaign_id with different attempt_ids; a published bundle is immutable and no individual runner may add files to it
identity_and_custody.campaign_result_bundle: a campaign bundle is a NEW directory containing a campaign_manifest.json that REFERENCES the sealed attempts by their attempt_id and manifest_content_hash (bytes of the referenced attempts are never modified); its construction is a separate, future authorized step

crash_and_resume_policy.no_auto_retry: a crash or interruption is NEVER retried automatically
crash_and_resume_policy.interrupted_staging: the staging directory is preserved as <attempt_id>.interrupted
crash_and_resume_policy.resume_requires_authorization: resuming an attempt requires --resume-authorized-attempt <attempt_id> AND --resume-authorization-token; a resume CONSUMES A NEW EXPLICIT AUTHORIZATION
crash_and_resume_policy.checkpoint_reuse_conditions: checkpoints may be reused ONLY if prereg, execution contract, freeze, runner SHA, parameters, execution scope and the authorization attempt match exactly
crash_and_resume_policy.no_mixing: results from two different attempts are never mixed
crash_and_resume_policy.technical_failure_is_not_science: a technical failure (crash, signal, resource kill) never converts into a scientific verdict; only a CLEAN frozen-deadline expiry may convert to INCONCLUSIVE_BY_COST (G0A cost rule)

capture_per_seed: sanitized message (truncated, no traceback, repo paths masked)
failed_seed_policy.under_or_equal_20_percent: metrics are computed over SUCCESSFUL seeds only (the denominator excludes failed seeds); the inferential n is the number of successful seeds; the failures and reduced n MUST be disclosed in the report
failed_seed_policy.g0b_frac_synced_denominator: SUCCESSFUL_SEEDS_ONLY (frozen choice; failed seeds disclosed per cell, never counted as non-synchronization)
failed_seed_policy.g0c_single_seed: G0C has one seed: ANY technical failure or nonfinite value => EXECUTION_INVALID
failed_seed_policy.g0a_distinctions: G0A distinguishes: failed cell (recorded in the ledger with failed=true), incomplete-by-frozen-cost (clean deadline => INTERRUPTED_BY_COST => INCONCLUSIVE_BY_COST), and external interruption (propagates; staging preserved as .interrupted; NO scientific verdict)
